Most other listed swaps do not obviously complete a line; for example redoing ((3,2),(3,3)) would just form GGG on row 3 at c1-c3 if indexing is 1-based, but the board already reflects last action and with one move left the clearest guaranteed match from current state is the column-4 triple. Goal: maximize final score now via a certain match, so pursue the guaranteed line-forming swap.
experiences.tasks: Match three or more candies in a row/column to clear the board and maximize score.
